calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was previously on calendar on November 12, 2013 at which time the Court requested further evidence. There are no facts upon which the Court could make a determination. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is denied.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2013 Continued To Nov-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Phuc Van Le in Propria Persona. Phuong Anh Le in Propria Persona.

Mr. Le stated that they do not have any supporting documents, that they have some pictures but no statements of any person attending the marriage, that the marriage was performed by him and his Wife, and that it was not performed by any Minister. The Court informed the Parties that they do not have enough supporting documents, and to file any documents or statements from anyone they wish for the Court to consider. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was continued to November 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Clark. (Not Reported)
